question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main sections of the thesis. It only provides the introduction and problem statement but fails to outline the subsequent chapters (e.g., literature review, methodology, results, conclusion).

question: Description
feedback: The text does not briefly describe the contents of each section. While it explains the motivation and constraints of the project, it does not summarize what specific topics or tasks will be covered in the other parts of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be easily understood from this text. Since the list of chapters and their descriptions are missing, the reader cannot infer the logical flow or organization of the full document.
